CMP-20260209-120745.subject: Reservation Q7K2LM – Request reimbursement forlost connection
CMP-20260209-120745.complaint_raw: I was flying on air chaina to Barcelona and then on to London on BA but AC was late so that I missed my conection
CMP-20260209-120745.complaint_professional:
Dear Customer Relations Team,

I am writing to request assistance following a missed connection caused by a delay on my inbound flight.

Key facts:
- Itinerary: Air China flight to Barcelona connecting to a British Airways flight to London
- The Air China flight arrived late
- As a result, I missed my British Airways connection to London

Requested remedy:
- Please provide alternative travel to London at the earliest opportunity
- Please confirm any compensation or assistance available due to the missed connection

Thank you for your prompt help. I can provide my booking reference and any additional details you require.

Sincerely,
[Your Name]
